baseline_definition: iTransformer backbone with Active_Pow extracted from the multivariate forecast output and target-regime-conditioned PCMCI soft attention bias selected by input_end_regime.

regime_causal_mask.selection_detail: input_end_regime at encoder_end - 1; no target timestamp regime is used for gating
regime_causal_mask.fallback_mask: all-zero additive attention bias, equivalent to no structural causal constraint

1.mask_format: soft additive attention bias, 0.0=allowed, approximately -1 final-logit non-edge bias before softmax

2.mask_format: soft additive attention bias, 0.0=allowed, approximately -1 final-logit non-edge bias before softmax

3.mask_format: soft additive attention bias, 0.0=allowed, approximately -1 final-logit non-edge bias before softmax

4.mask_format: soft additive attention bias, 0.0=allowed, approximately -1 final-logit non-edge bias before softmax

5.mask_format: soft additive attention bias, 0.0=allowed, approximately -1 final-logit non-edge bias before softmax

6.mask_format: soft additive attention bias, 0.0=allowed, approximately -1 final-logit non-edge bias before softmax

7.mask_format: soft additive attention bias, 0.0=allowed, approximately -1 final-logit non-edge bias before softmax

regime_causal_mask.graph_semantics: Target-regime-conditioned PCMCI graphs are used as leakage-safe dynamic soft attention bias selected by the last observed input regime.

validation.fallback_definition: regime not in loaded_regimes, including regime 0 night, maps to no-mask bias

test.fallback_definition: regime not in loaded_regimes, including regime 0 night, maps to no-mask bias

validation_metrics.mape_note: MAPE excludes targets with abs(y_true) <= 1e-6 to avoid night-time zero division.
validation_metrics.normalization_note: nmae_by_mean/nrmse_by_mean/nmbe_by_mean use mean(abs(y_true)) as denominator. nmae_by_max/nrmse_by_max/nmbe_by_max use max(abs(y_true)) in the evaluated split/scope as a PV capacity proxy.

reported_metrics.mape_note: MAPE excludes targets with abs(y_true) <= 1e-6 to avoid night-time zero division.
reported_metrics.normalization_note: nmae_by_mean/nrmse_by_mean/nmbe_by_mean use mean(abs(y_true)) as denominator. nmae_by_max/nrmse_by_max/nmbe_by_max use max(abs(y_true)) in the evaluated split/scope as a PV capacity proxy.

test_metrics.mape_note: MAPE excludes targets with abs(y_true) <= 1e-6 to avoid night-time zero division.
test_metrics.normalization_note: nmae_by_mean/nrmse_by_mean/nmbe_by_mean use mean(abs(y_true)) as denominator. nmae_by_max/nrmse_by_max/nmbe_by_max use max(abs(y_true)) in the evaluated split/scope as a PV capacity proxy.
